languages.text: "Врага... изничтожить! Пр... проверить арсе-е-енал! Мо-мое тело — враг". {n}Мужчина скрючивается, ударяя себя по груди раз за разом и пуская кровавые слюни. Внезапно он выпрямляется, вопит и начинает колотить по импланту сильнее.{/n} "Не мое, не мое, не мое! Гр-р-рызет... изнутри, насмехается. Погибну... Изничтожу!"

"Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches over and strikes himself in the chest again and again, drooling bloody saliva. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"
languages.original_text: "Врага... изничтожить! Пр... проверить арсе-е-енал! Мо-мое тело — враг". {n}Мужчина скрючивается, ударяя себя по груди раз за разом и пуская кровавые слюни. Внезапно он выпрямляется, вопит и начинает колотить по импланту сильнее.{/n} "Не мое, не мое, не мое! Гр-р-рызет... изнутри, насмехается. Погибну... Изничтожу!"

traits.locale_text: "Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches and strikes himself in the chest several times, dripping saliva mixed with blood. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"

Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"
"The enemy must be destroyed! My body is the enemy. No, not mine, someone else's! It's gnaaawing at me from within, taunting me. I'll die, but I'll destroy it! Ch... check the arsenaaal!"

"Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches and strikes himself in the chest several times, dripping saliva mixed with blood. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"

"Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches over and strikes himself in the chest again and again, drooling bloody saliva. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"

languages.text: 「敵は消滅せねば！私の身体は敵だ。いや、私の身体ではない、他人の身体だ。内側から、私を嘲笑う。私は死ぬが、敵を消滅させる！私が私でなくなる前に…」
languages.original_text: "The enemy must be destroyed! My body is the enemy. No, not mine, someone else's! It's gnawing at me from within, taunting me. I'll die, but I'll destroy it! Before I stop being me..."

traits.locale_text: 「敵は消滅せねば！私の身体は敵だ。いや、私の身体ではない、他人の身体だ。内側から、私を嘲笑う。私は死ぬが、敵を消滅させる！私が私でなくなる前に…」

languages.text: “消灭……敌人！检……检查军械库！我的——我的身体就是……敌人。”{n}那人佝偻着身子，捶了自己胸口好几下，唾液混着血液从嘴角滴落。随后他猛地直起身，发出一声哀嚎，开始更加猛烈地殴打体内的植入物。{/n}“不是我的，不是我的，不是我的！它从体内啃噬我……嘲弄我。我要死了……我要毁掉它！”
languages.original_text: "Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches and strikes himself in the chest several times, dripping saliva mixed with blood. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"

traits.locale_text: “消灭……敌人！检……检查军械库！我的——我的身体就是……敌人。”{n}那人佝偻着身子，捶了自己胸口好几下，唾液混着血液从嘴角滴落。随后他猛地直起身，发出一声哀嚎，开始更加猛烈地殴打体内的植入物。{/n}“不是我的，不是我的，不是我的！它从体内啃噬我……嘲弄我。我要死了……我要毁掉它！”

languages.text: « Détruisez l'ennemi ! Vé... vérifiez l'aaarsenal ! M-mon corps... c'est l'ennemi. » {n}L'homme courbe le dos et se frappe la poitrine à plusieurs reprises, sa bouche écumant de salive mêlée de sang. Puis, il se redresse brusquement, laisse échapper un hurlement et se met à cogner son implant avec une force décuplée.{/n} « Pas à moi, pas à moi, pas à moi ! Il me ronge de l'intérieur, il me provoque. Je meurs. Je vais le détruire ! »
languages.original_text: "Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches and strikes himself in the chest several times, dripping saliva mixed with blood. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"

traits.locale_text: « Détruisez l'ennemi ! Vé... vérifiez l'aaarsenal ! M-mon corps... c'est l'ennemi. » {n}L'homme courbe le dos et se frappe la poitrine à plusieurs reprises, sa bouche écumant de salive mêlée de sang. Puis, il se redresse brusquement, laisse échapper un hurlement et se met à cogner son implant avec une force décuplée.{/n} « Pas à moi, pas à moi, pas à moi ! Il me ronge de l'intérieur, il me provoque. Je meurs. Je vais le détruire ! »

languages.text: «Destruir... al enemigo! Com... ¡comprobar el arsenaaal! Mi... mi cuerpo es... el enemigo». {n}El hombre se encorva y se aporrea el pecho, goteando saliva mezclada con sangre. Después, se endereza bruscamente y empieza a machacar su implante con más fuerza.{/n} «¡No es mío, no es mío, no es mío! Me corroe por dentro... Se burla de mí. Moriré... ¡Lo destruiré!».
languages.original_text: "Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches and strikes himself in the chest several times, dripping saliva mixed with blood. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"

traits.locale_text: «Destruir... al enemigo! Com... ¡comprobar el arsenaaal! Mi... mi cuerpo es... el enemigo». {n}El hombre se encorva y se aporrea el pecho, goteando saliva mezclada con sangre. Después, se endereza bruscamente y empieza a machacar su implante con más fuerza.{/n} «¡No es mío, no es mío, no es mío! Me corroe por dentro... Se burla de mí. Moriré... ¡Lo destruiré!».

languages.text: "Düşmanı... Yok et! Ce... Cephaneliği kontrol et! Be... Bedenim... Düşmandır." {n}Adam, kamburunu çıkarıyor ve kendine birkaç kez göğsüne vurarak kan karışık salya akıtıyor. Ardından aniden doğruluyor, bir feryat koparıyor ve implantına daha da sert vurmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Benim değil, benim değil, benim değil! İçeriden beni ke... Kemiriyor... Benimle alay ediyor. Öleceğim... Onu yok edeceğim!"
languages.original_text: "Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches and strikes himself in the chest several times, dripping saliva mixed with blood. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"

traits.locale_text: "Düşmanı... Yok et! Ce... Cephaneliği kontrol et! Be... Bedenim... Düşmandır." {n}Adam, kamburunu çıkarıyor ve kendine birkaç kez göğsüne vurarak kan karışık salya akıtıyor. Ardından aniden doğruluyor, bir feryat koparıyor ve implantına daha da sert vurmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Benim değil, benim değil, benim değil! İçeriden beni ke... Kemiriyor... Benimle alay ediyor. Öleceğim... Onu yok edeceğim!"

languages.text: "Zerstört ... den Feind! Ü... überprüft das Arsenaaaal! M-mein Leib ist ... der Feind." {n}Der Mann krümmt sich und schlägt sich mehrmals gegen die Brust, während Blut und Speichel aus seinem Mund tropfen. Dann richtet er sich abrupt auf, stößt einen Schrei aus und schlägt noch fester gegen sein Implantat.{/n} "Nicht meines, nicht meines, nicht meines! Es naaaagt an mir ... innerlich ... und verspottet mich. Ich sterbe ... Ich werde es zerstören!"
languages.original_text: "Destroy... the enemy! Ch... check the arsenaaal! My-my body is... the enemy." {n}The man hunches and strikes himself in the chest several times, dripping saliva mixed with blood. Then, he straightens abruptly, lets out a wail, and starts bashing his implant even harder.{/n} "Not mine, not mine, not mine! It's gnaaawing at me... from within, taunting me. I'll die... I'll destroy it!"
